demo.name: Fast Travel Bell
description: Used to build fast-travel points.

demo.name: Lamp
description: A lamp that will illuminate even the deepest darkness.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Crewman
description: Blackbeard's sailors' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

EA0_10.name: Newhand Insignia
description: A fresh-pressed mark carried by Blackbeard's newest hands.
Turn it in on Tortuga to any archipelago faction to gain reputation.
comment: Proof Blackbeard can afford to lose men.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Sergeant
description: Blackbeard's sergeants' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

EA0_10.name: Deckhand Insignia
description: Worn by sailors who've survived a few hard runs under Blackbeard's flag.
Turn it in on Tortuga to any archipelago faction to gain reputation.
comment: Worn by hands that don't hesitate to kill.

demo.name: Insignia of a Blackbeard Lieutenant
description: Blackbeard's lieutenants' special insignia.
Turn them in on Tortuga to any faction of the archipelago to increase your reputation.

EA0_10.name: Veteran Insignia
description: Only true cutthroats who know every dirty trick are worthy to carry one.
Turn it in on Tortuga to any archipelago faction to gain reputation.
comment: Taken from someone who didn't make mistakes.

demo.name: Medicine
description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.
Can be sold for piastres.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

demo.name: Ancient Incense Burner
description: A rare artifact of an ancient people, preserved against all odds.

demo.name: Spirits
description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.
Can be sold for piastres.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

demo.name: Closed Scallop Shell
description: It might contain a pearl.

demo.name: Provisions
description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.
Can be sold for piastres.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

demo.name: Bone Beads
description: A simple decoration of ancient peoples, made from bone and nuts.

demo.name: Wooden Talisman
description: A fish-shaped amulet. Ancient fishermen wore it to bring a richer catch.

demo.name: Clay Vase
description: A vase with a wavy pattern.
Corn seeds are stuck in the cracks.

demo.name: Naval Supplies
description: A crate with securely packed goods for easy transportation by sea.
Can be sold for piastres.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

demo.name: Tumbaga Ingot
description: An ancient alloy of copper and gold, discovered by the native peoples in ages past.
Required to ascend equipment.

EA0_10.name: Munitions
description: A heavy shipment of powder and shot intended for sale.
Keep it dry, keep it sealed.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

EA0_10.name: Old Salt Insignia
description: A scarred, storied mark from a true sea-dog of Blackbeard's crews.
Turn it in on Tortuga to any archipelago faction to gain reputation.
comment: This belonged to someone who outlived mercy.

EA0_10.name: Letter of Favor
description: Whom it may concern: the bearer of this letter has earned their standing through deed and loyalty.
Treat them as a captain of proven worth, one who can be trusted with coin, cargo, and sensitive work.
Turn it in on Tortuga to any archipelago faction to gain reputation.
comment: A favor in writing: the pirate's version of a royal pardon.

EA0_10.name: Contraband
description: Unmarked cargo meant to stay off the books.
Could be sold to Smugglers.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

EA0_10.name: Luxuries
description: Refined goods sealed for shipment: fragile, expensive, and always in demand.
Could be sold to Smugglers.
comment: Open it and you're out of the cut.

EA0_10.name: Silver Spoon
description: Antique spoon.
It served one of the pioneers of the New World well.
Could be sold to Smugglers.

EA0_10.name: Silver Button
description: An old trinket - the silver has dulled a bit, but it's probably still worth something.
Could be sold to Smugglers.

EA0_10.name: Silver Earring
description: Its original silver sheen faded long ago.
It might still appeal to collectors and traders in old wares.
Could be sold to Smugglers.

EA0_10.name: Ancient Chalice
description: A rare artifact of an ancient people, preserved against all odds.

EA0_10.name: Pot with Golden Horns
description: A rare artifact of an ancient people, preserved against all odds.

EA0_10.name: Gold Mask of the Priest
description: Made from pure gold, this mask is truly terrifying.

EA0_10.name: Gold Temple Jug
description: The jug, sparkling with gold and three huge rubies, is a rare and very expensive find.

EA0_10.name: Gold Vase of the Chief
description: With its elegant pattern and precious stones, this is no mere vase but a small fortune.

EA0_10.name: Richard's Crew Key
description: A sturdy key for a sturdy pirate chest.
Found at the pirate base in the Coastal Jungle.

EA0_10.name: Hand's Crew Key
description: A sturdy key for a sturdy pirate chest.
Found at the pirate base in the Foothills.

EA0_10.name: Ancient Foothills Key
description: A round stone disk covered in faint, intricate patterns and mysterious inscriptions.
